Itinerary_Version.conversation_history: I want 7 days travel plan in Toronto.

Itinerary.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip
Itinerary.summary: A balanced week in Toronto covering downtown highlights, museums, neighbourhoods, islands, and a day trip to Niagara Falls. Each day includes main POIs, a recommended restaurant, and transport notes.

Transport.notes: Arrive at YYZ, take UP Express to Union Station or taxi to hotel.

POI.name: CN Tower & Harbourfront
POI.description: Visit CN Tower viewpoint and stroll along the harbourfront promenade.

Restaurant.name: Harbourfront Bistro (recommended)
Restaurant.description: Casual waterfront dining to recover from travel.

POI.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
POI.description: Major natural history and world cultures museum.

POI.name: Bata Shoe Museum / University of Toronto stroll
POI.description: Smaller specialty museum and campus walk nearby.

Restaurant.name: Museum District Cafe
Restaurant.description: Lunch near ROM with quick service for museum visits.

POI.name: Distillery District
POI.description: Cobblestone streets, galleries, boutiques, and historic buildings.

POI.name: St. Lawrence Market
POI.description: Iconic market for local foods and crafts.

Restaurant.name: St. Lawrence Eatery
Restaurant.description: Casual market dining for local specialties.

Transport.notes: Take ferry from Jack Layton Ferry Terminal; check schedule.

POI.name: Centre Island & Hanlan's Point
POI.description: Beaches, picnic areas, bike paths and skyline views.

Restaurant.name: Island Cafe / Picnic
Restaurant.description: Casual options on the island or self-catered picnic.

POI.name: Kensington Market
POI.description: Eclectic shops, street art, vintage stores and multicultural eats.

POI.name: Queen West (art and boutiques)
POI.description: Trendy shops, galleries and music venues along Queen Street West.

Restaurant.name: Local Brunch Spot
Restaurant.description: Hip cafe for brunch or late lunch in the neighbourhoods.

POI.name: Art Gallery of Ontario (AGO)
POI.description: Extensive Canadian and international art collections.

POI.name: Ontario Science Centre (optional afternoon)
POI.description: Interactive science exhibits ideal for families and curious adults.

Restaurant.name: Gallery District Bistro
Restaurant.description: Lunch near AGO with light menu.

Day.theme: Day Trip to Niagara Falls or Free Day

Transport.notes: Choose a day trip to Niagara Falls (1.5 hr) or use the day for shopping/relaxing in Toronto.

POI.name: Niagara Falls (if chosen)
POI.description: Iconic waterfalls, boat tours, and scenic viewpoints.

Restaurant.name: Farewell Dinner Restaurant (Downtown)
Restaurant.description: Nice dinner downtown to close the trip, reserve in advance.
